title: Firey's Ultimate Trailer Pack
description: This Project aims to make you play Minecraft as you were in a Mojang Trailer!
body:
Ultimate Trailer Pack has the purpose of making your game look like a Minecraft trailer. It aims to recreate Minecraft Trailer Vibes with some Graphical improvements, QoL changes and Game Optimization.
 
![Big Logo and Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd38e5da77cdb1142fa7d635c5629efe8a4477ec_0.webp)
> Preview of the Nether (using Complementary Shaders Unbound Euphoria Patches)

# Play the Trailer!
Thanks to his texture packs and shaders this modpack brings the lively environment of trailers directly into your game!

# Optimization and Performance
Mods such as Sodium, Lithium and more are included to make the game smooth and playable from approximately any device!

# Visual Effects
The Modpack is full of mods that add or modify effects (such as particles, sounds, animations).
Every setting has been modified to make the experience perfect!

# Improved GUI
Every Aspect of Player's GUI has been changed to make the game more immersive!

# Client Side
97% of the mods are fully client-side and the rest of them are only optional on server just so you can use this modpack everywhere you need!

# On Fabric
This modpack is built on fabric, wich is lightweight, fast and optimized so you can assure yourself great performances with this pack!

# Ready to Play
When you first launch the modpack, everything is waiting for you to play; keybind conflicts patched (most of them), shaders option changed and much more!

# Multiplayer Support
Mods like Essential or e4mc are also included just to make sure you can play with your friends!

# Fully Customizable
Once you got bored by a feature or you simply want to spice things up, there are lots of options to customize your experience. This includes: mods customization, multiple shaders, resourcepack downloader (thanks to Resourcify) and even if you are running Minecraft on a potato you will find a way to make it smooth!


## Also I couldn't include some of the mods and Texture Packs I used, but you can download them here and install them yourself.
[**Alittl Axolotl & Friends**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/alittl-axolotl)

[**Ambient Sounds 6**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ambientsounds)
